Item: PAIRWISE ABNORMAL CORRELATION MATRICES — STEP 4 SNAPSHOT
1. Sort all live stocks with valid momentum into deciles.
2. For each loser/winner stock, regress its 52-week returns on FF3 factors (Mkt-RF, SMB, HML) → collect residuals.
3. Compute Corr(resid_i, resid_j) for every unique pair (i, j) within each decile.
4. CoMOM_decile = mean of all K*(K-1)/2 pairwise correlations.

Details: Pearson correlation of FF3 residuals between each pair of loser-decile stocks. Diagonal = 1.0.
All 14535 unique pairs (i < j) in the loser decile.
All 14535 unique pairs in the winner decile.
